pi_items.source: Matches the explicit directory path provided in the task description for the agent to create.
Matches verifier.py logic which attempts to read this path, though the script to generate it (export_result.ps1) is missing.

privileged_info_summary: Discovered that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) defined in the task hooks are missing from the environment directory. This prevents the agent's work from being exported to C:\temp\task_result.json, causing the verifier to fail perpetually. The target directory requirements and citation text mappings align perfectly with the prompt description.
